query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       se.stationCode,
       COUNT(*) AS event_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN se.countForProductivity = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS productivity_event_count
FROM station_events se
WHERE se.operatorUserId = 750212
  AND se.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), se.stationCode
ORDER BY business_date DESC, se.stationCode;

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       psd.stationCode,
       pc.categoryName,
       pc.brandName,
       pc.subtypeCode,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints) * 100, 2) AS display_points,
       ROUND(AVG(psd.baseUnitPoints) * 100, 3) AS avg_display_unit_points,
       MIN(ptc.dailyTargetQty) AS configured_daily_target_qty
FROM productivity_score_details psd
LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = psd.categoryId
LEFT JOIN productivity_target_configs ptc ON ptc.id = psd.targetConfigId
WHERE psd.userId = 750212
  AND psd.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), psd.stationCode, pc.categoryName, pc.brandName, pc.subtypeCode
ORDER BY business_date DESC, psd.stationCode, pc.categoryName;

       se.stationCode,
       COUNT(*) AS event_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN se.countForProductivity = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS productivity_event_count
FROM station_events se
WHERE se.operatorUserId = 750212
  AND se.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), se.stationCode
ORDER BY business_date DESC, se.stationCode;

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       psd.stationCode,
       pc.categoryName,
       pc.brandName,
       pc.subtypeCode,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints) * 100, 2) AS display_points,
       ROUND(AVG(psd.baseUnitPoints) * 100, 3) AS avg_display_unit_points,
       MIN(ptc.dailyTargetQty) AS configured_daily_target_qty
FROM productivity_score_details psd
LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = psd.categoryId
LEFT JOIN productivity_target_configs ptc ON ptc.id = psd.targetConfigId
WHERE psd.userId = 750212
  AND psd.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(UTC_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), psd.stationCode, pc.categoryName, pc.brandName, pc.subtypeCode
ORDER BY business_date DESC, psd.stationCode, pc.categoryName;
